acds_client.h(3) Library Functions Manual acds_client.h(3)

NAME

acds_client.h - ACIP client-side protocol library and ACDS client connection API.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct acds_client_config_t
ACDS client connection configuration. struct acds_client_t
ACDS client connection handle. struct acds_session_create_params_t
Session creation request parameters. struct acds_session_create_result_t
Session creation result. struct acds_session_lookup_result_t
Session lookup result. struct acds_session_join_params_t
Session join parameters. struct acds_session_join_result_t
Session join result.

Typedefs


typedef bool(* parallel_connect_should_exit_fn) (void *user_data)

Functions


asciichat_error_t acds_client_connect (acds_client_t *client, const acds_client_config_t *config)
Connect to ACDS server. void acds_client_disconnect (acds_client_t *client)
Disconnect from ACDS server. asciichat_error_t acds_session_create (acds_client_t *client, const acds_session_create_params_t *params, acds_session_create_result_t *result)
Create a new session on the discovery server. asciichat_error_t acds_session_lookup (acds_client_t *client, const char *session_string, acds_session_lookup_result_t *result)
Look up session by string. asciichat_error_t acds_session_join (acds_client_t *client, const acds_session_join_params_t *params, acds_session_join_result_t *result)
Join an existing session. asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_create (const uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, uint8_t signature_out[64])
Sign a SESSION_CREATE message. asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_create (const uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, const uint8_t signature[64])
Verify SESSION_CREATE signature. asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_join (const uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, const char *session_string, uint8_t signature_out[64])
Sign a SESSION_JOIN message. asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_join (const uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, const char *session_string, const uint8_t signature[64])
Verify SESSION_JOIN signature. bool acds_validate_timestamp (uint64_t timestamp_ms, uint32_t window_seconds)
Check if timestamp is within acceptable window. void acds_client_config_init_defaults (acds_client_config_t *config)
Initialize ACDS client configuration with defaults.

Detailed Description

ACIP client-side protocol library and ACDS client connection API.

Definition in file acds_client.h.

Typedef Documentation

typedef bool(* parallel_connect_should_exit_fn) (void *user_data)

Definition at line 104 of file acds_client.h.

Function Documentation

void acds_client_config_init_defaults (acds_client_config_t * config)

Initialize ACDS client configuration with defaults. Sets default values:

  • server_address: "127.0.0.1"
  • server_port: 27225
  • timeout_ms: 5000

Parameters

Config Module Configuration to initialize

Definition at line 46 of file acds_client.c.

46                                                                     {
47   if (!config) {
48     return;
49   }
50 
51   memset(config, 0, sizeof(*config));
52   SAFE_STRNCPY(config->server_address, "127.0.0.1", sizeof(config->server_address));
53   config->server_port = ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT;
54   config->timeout_ms = 5 * MS_PER_SEC_INT;
55 }




References ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT,
    MS_PER_SEC_INT, SAFE_STRNCPY,
    acds_client_config_t::server_address,
    acds_client_config_t::server_port, and
    acds_client_config_t::timeout_ms.


Referenced by client_crypto_init(), and
    server_main().






asciichat_error_t acds_client_connect
  (acds_client_t * client, const acds_client_config_t *
  config)


Connect to ACDS server. Establishes TCP connection to the
    discovery server.




Parameters


client Client handle (output)


Config Module Connection configuration


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 61 of file acds_client.c.


61                                                                                                  {
62   if (!client || !config) {
63     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "client or config is NULL");
64   }
65 
66   memset(client, 0, sizeof(*client));
67   memcpy(&client->config, config, sizeof(acds_client_config_t));
68   client->socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE;
69   client->connected = false;
70 
71   // Resolve server address (supports both hostnames and IP addresses, IPv4 and IPv6)
72   struct addrinfo hints;
73   struct addrinfo *result = NULL;
74   memset(&hints, 0, sizeof(hints));
75   hints.ai_family = AF_UNSPEC;     // IPv4 or IPv6
76   hints.ai_socktype = SOCK_STREAM; // TCP
77 
78   char port_str[16];
79   safe_snprintf(port_str, sizeof(port_str), "%d", config->server_port);
80 
81   log_debug("ACDS: Resolving address '%s:%s'...", config->server_address, port_str);
82   int gai_result = getaddrinfo(config->server_address, port_str, &hints, &result);
83   if (gai_result != 0) {
84     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to resolve server address '%s': %s", config->server_address,
85                      gai_strerror(gai_result));
86   }
87   log_debug("ACDS: Address resolved successfully");
88   freeaddrinfo(result);
89 
90   // Use parallel_connect to attempt IPv4 and IPv6 connections concurrently
91   parallel_connect_config_t pconn_config = {
92       .hostname = config->server_address,
93       .port = config->server_port,
94       .timeout_ms = config->timeout_ms,
95       .should_exit_callback = config->should_exit_callback,
96       .callback_data = config->callback_data,
97   };
98 
99   asciichat_error_t pconn_result = parallel_connect(&pconn_config, &client->socket);
100   if (pconn_result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
101     client->connected = true;
102 
103     /* Register ACDS client with named registry */
104     char acds_name[64];
105     snprintf(acds_name, sizeof(acds_name), "acds_client:%s:%d", config->server_address, config->server_port);
106     NAMED_REGISTER(client, acds_name, "acds_client_t", "0x%tx", NULL);
107 
108     log_info("Connected to ACDS server at %s:%d", config->server_address, config->server_port);
109     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
110   }
111 
112   return pconn_result;
113 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    acds_client_config_t::callback_data, acds_client_t::config,
    acds_client_t::connected, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NETWORK, INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, log_debug,
    log_info, NAMED_REGISTER, parallel_connect(),
    safe_snprintf(), acds_client_config_t::server_address,
    acds_client_config_t::server_port, SET_ERRNO,
    acds_client_config_t::should_exit_callback,
    acds_client_t::socket, and
  acds_client_config_t::timeout_ms.


Referenced by client_crypto_init(), and
    server_main().






void
  acds_client_disconnect (acds_client_t * client)


Disconnect from ACDS server. Closes the connection and cleans up
    resources.




Parameters


client Client handle


Definition at line 115 of file acds_client.c.


115                                                    {
116   if (!client) {
117     return;
118   }
119 
120   if (client->socket != INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE) {
121     socket_close(client->socket);
122     client->socket = INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE;
123   }
124 
125   client->connected = false;
126   log_debug("Disconnected from ACDS server");
127 }






References acds_client_t::connected,
    INVALID_SOCKET_VALUE, log_debug, acds_client_t::socket,
    and socket_close().


Referenced by client_crypto_init(), and
    server_main().






asciichat_error_t acds_session_create
  (acds_client_t * client, const acds_session_create_params_t *
  params, acds_session_create_result_t * result)


Create a new session on the discovery server. Sends SESSION_CREATE
    packet and receives SESSION_CREATED response.




Parameters


client Connected ACDS client


params Session creation parameters


result Session creation result (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 133 of file acds_client.c.


134                                                                             {
135   if (!client || !params || !result) {
136     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
137   }
138 
139   if (!client->connected) {
140     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Not connected to ACDS server");
141   }
142 
143   // Build SESSION_CREATE payload
144   acip_session_create_t req;
145   memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
146 
147   memcpy(req.identity_pubkey, params->identity_pubkey, 32);
148 
149   // Sign the request: type || timestamp || capabilities
150   uint64_t timestamp = (uint64_t)time(NULL) * 1000; // Unix ms
151   req.timestamp = timestamp;
152   req.capabilities = params->capabilities;
153   req.max_participants = params->max_participants;
154 
155   // Generate Ed25519 signature for identity verification
156   asciichat_error_t sign_result = acds_sign_session_create(params->identity_seckey, timestamp, params->capabilities,
157                                                            params->max_participants, req.signature);
158   if (sign_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
159     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to sign SESSION_CREATE request");
160   }
161 
162   req.has_password = params->has_password ? 1 : 0;
163   if (params->has_password) {
164     // Hash password with Argon2id using libsodium
165     // crypto_pwhash_str produces a null-terminated ASCII string
166     if (crypto_pwhash_str((char *)req.password_hash, params->password, strlen(params->password),
167                           crypto_pwhash_OPSLIMIT_INTERACTIVE, crypto_pwhash_MEMLIMIT_INTERACTIVE) != 0) {
168       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to hash password (out of memory)");
169     }
170   } else {
171     memset(req.password_hash, 0, sizeof(req.password_hash));
172   }
173 
174   req.reserved_string_len = 0; // Auto-generate
175   if (params->reserved_string && params->reserved_string[0] != '\0') {
176     req.reserved_string_len = strlen(params->reserved_string);
177     // Variable part would follow here (not implemented yet)
178   }
179 
180   // Server connection information
181   SAFE_STRNCPY(req.server_address, params->server_address, sizeof(req.server_address));
182   req.server_port = params->server_port;
183 
184   // IP disclosure policy
185   // Auto-detection: If password is set, IP will be revealed after verification
186   // If no password, require explicit opt-in via acds_expose_ip
187   req.expose_ip_publicly = params->acds_expose_ip ? 1 : 0;
188 
189   // Session type (Direct TCP or WebRTC)
190   req.session_type = params->session_type;
191 
192   // Send SESSION_CREATE packet
193   asciichat_error_t send_result = send_packet(client->socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, &req, sizeof(req));
194   if (send_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
195     return send_result;
196   }
197 
198   log_debug("Sent SESSION_CREATE request");
199   log_debug("★ ACDS_CLIENT: About to receive SESSION_CREATED on socket %d", client->socket);
200 
201   // Receive SESSION_CREATED response
202   packet_type_t resp_type;
203   void *resp_payload = NULL;
204   size_t resp_size = 0;
205 
206   int recv_result = receive_packet(client->socket, &resp_type, &resp_payload, &resp_size);
207   log_debug("★ ACDS_CLIENT: receive_packet returned %d", recv_result);
208   if (recv_result < 0) {
209     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to receive SESSION_CREATED response");
210   }
211 
212   // Check response type
213   if (resp_type != PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATED) {
214     if (resp_type == PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE || resp_type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_ERROR) {
215       log_error("Session creation failed: server returned error packet");
216       buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
217       return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Session creation failed");
218     }
219     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
220     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Unexpected response type: 0x%02X", resp_type);
221   }
222 
223   // Parse SESSION_CREATED response
224   if (resp_size < sizeof(acip_session_created_t)) {
225     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
226     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "SESSION_CREATED response too small: %zu bytes", resp_size);
227   }
228 
229   acip_session_created_t *resp = (acip_session_created_t *)resp_payload;
230 
231   // Copy session string (null-terminate)
232   size_t string_len = resp->session_string_len < sizeof(result->session_string) - 1
233                           ? resp->session_string_len
234                           : sizeof(result->session_string) - 1;
235   memcpy(result->session_string, resp->session_string, string_len);
236   result->session_string[string_len] = '\0';
237 
238   memcpy(result->session_id, resp->session_id, 16);
239   result->expires_at = resp->expires_at;
240 
241   log_info("Session created: %s (expires at %llu)", result->session_string, (unsigned long long)result->expires_at);
242 
243   buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
244   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
245 }






References acds_session_create_params_t::acds_expose_ip,
    acds_sign_session_create(), acip_session_create_t,
    acip_session_created_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    buffer_pool_free(),
    acds_session_create_params_t::capabilities,
    acds_client_t::connected, ERROR_CRYPTO,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK,
    acds_session_create_result_t::expires_at,
    acds_session_create_params_t::has_password,
    acds_session_create_params_t::identity_pubkey,
    acds_session_create_params_t::identity_seckey, log_debug,
    log_error, log_info,
    acds_session_create_params_t::max_participants,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_ERROR, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATED, PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE,
    acds_session_create_params_t::password, receive_packet(),
    acds_session_create_params_t::reserved_string, SAFE_STRNCPY,
    send_packet(), acds_session_create_params_t::server_address,
    acds_session_create_params_t::server_port,
    acds_session_create_result_t::session_id,
    acds_session_create_result_t::session_string,
    acds_session_create_params_t::session_type, SET_ERRNO, and
    acds_client_t::socket.

asciichat_error_t acds_session_join (acds_client_t
  * client, const acds_session_join_params_t * params,
  acds_session_join_result_t * result)


Join an existing session. Sends SESSION_JOIN packet and receives
    SESSION_JOINED response.




Parameters


client Connected ACDS client


params Join parameters


result Join result (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 324 of file acds_client.c.


325                                                                         {
326   if (!client || !params || !result) {
327     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
328   }
329 
330   if (!client->connected) {
331     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Not connected to ACDS server");
332   }
333 
334   // Build SESSION_JOIN payload
335   acip_session_join_t req;
336   memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
337 
338   req.session_string_len = strlen(params->session_string);
339   if (req.session_string_len >= sizeof(req.session_string)) {
340     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long");
341   }
342 
343   memcpy(req.session_string, params->session_string, req.session_string_len);
344   memcpy(req.identity_pubkey, params->identity_pubkey, 32);
345 
346   // Sign the request: type || timestamp || session_string
347   uint64_t timestamp = (uint64_t)time(NULL) * 1000;
348   req.timestamp = timestamp;
349 
350   // Generate Ed25519 signature for identity verification
351   asciichat_error_t sign_result =
352       acds_sign_session_join(params->identity_seckey, timestamp, params->session_string, req.signature);
353   if (sign_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
354     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Failed to sign SESSION_JOIN request");
355   }
356 
357   req.has_password = params->has_password ? 1 : 0;
358   if (params->has_password) {
359     SAFE_STRNCPY(req.password, params->password, sizeof(req.password));
360   }
361 
362   // Send SESSION_JOIN packet
363   asciichat_error_t send_result = send_packet(client->socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN, &req, sizeof(req));
364   if (send_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
365     return send_result;
366   }
367 
368   log_debug("Sent SESSION_JOIN request for '%s'", params->session_string);
369 
370   // Receive SESSION_JOINED response
371   packet_type_t resp_type;
372   void *resp_payload = NULL;
373   size_t resp_size = 0;
374 
375   int recv_result = receive_packet(client->socket, &resp_type, &resp_payload, &resp_size);
376   if (recv_result < 0) {
377     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to receive SESSION_JOINED response");
378   }
379 
380   if (resp_type != PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOINED) {
381     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
382     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Unexpected response type: 0x%02X", resp_type);
383   }
384 
385   if (resp_size < sizeof(acip_session_joined_t)) {
386     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
387     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "SESSION_JOINED response too small");
388   }
389 
390   acip_session_joined_t *resp = (acip_session_joined_t *)resp_payload;
391 
392   // Copy result
393   result->success = resp->success != 0;
394   if (result->success) {
395     memcpy(result->participant_id, resp->participant_id, 16);
396     memcpy(result->session_id, resp->session_id, 16);
397     // Server connection information (ONLY revealed after successful authentication)
398     result->session_type = resp->session_type;
399     SAFE_STRNCPY(result->server_address, resp->server_address, sizeof(result->server_address));
400     result->server_port = resp->server_port;
401     log_info("Joined session successfully (participant ID: %02x%02x..., server=%s:%d, type=%s)",
402              result->participant_id[0], result->participant_id[1], result->server_address, result->server_port,
403              result->session_type == SESSION_TYPE_WEBRTC ? "WebRTC" : "DirectTCP");
404   } else {
405     result->error_code = resp->error_code;
406     size_t msg_len = strnlen(resp->error_message, sizeof(resp->error_message));
407     if (msg_len >= sizeof(result->error_message)) {
408       msg_len = sizeof(result->error_message) - 1;
409     }
410     memcpy(result->error_message, resp->error_message, msg_len);
411     result->error_message[msg_len] = '\0';
412     log_warn("Failed to join session: %s (code %d)", result->error_message, result->error_code);
413   }
414 
415   buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
416   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
417 }

asciichat_error_t acds_session_lookup
  (acds_client_t * client, const char * session_string,
  acds_session_lookup_result_t * result)


Look up session by string. Sends SESSION_LOOKUP packet and
    receives SESSION_INFO response.




Parameters


client Connected ACDS client


session_string Session string to look up


result Lookup result (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 247 of file acds_client.c.


248                                                                             {
249   if (!client || !session_string || !result) {
250     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
251   }
252 
253   if (!client->connected) {
254     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Not connected to ACDS server");
255   }
256 
257   // Build SESSION_LOOKUP payload
258   acip_session_lookup_t req;
259   memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
260 
261   req.session_string_len = strlen(session_string);
262   if (req.session_string_len >= sizeof(req.session_string)) {
263     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long");
264   }
265 
266   memcpy(req.session_string, session_string, req.session_string_len);
267 
268   // Send SESSION_LOOKUP packet
269   asciichat_error_t send_result = send_packet(client->socket, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_LOOKUP, &req, sizeof(req));
270   if (send_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
271     return send_result;
272   }
273 
274   log_debug("Sent SESSION_LOOKUP request for '%s'", session_string);
275 
276   // Receive SESSION_INFO response
277   packet_type_t resp_type;
278   void *resp_payload = NULL;
279   size_t resp_size = 0;
280 
281   int recv_result = receive_packet(client->socket, &resp_type, &resp_payload, &resp_size);
282   if (recv_result < 0) {
283     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Failed to receive SESSION_INFO response");
284   }
285 
286   if (resp_type != PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_INFO) {
287     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
288     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "Unexpected response type: 0x%02X", resp_type);
289   }
290 
291   if (resp_size < sizeof(acip_session_info_t)) {
292     buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
293     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK, "SESSION_INFO response too small");
294   }
295 
296   acip_session_info_t *resp = (acip_session_info_t *)resp_payload;
297 
298   // Copy result
299   result->found = resp->found != 0;
300   if (result->found) {
301     memcpy(result->session_id, resp->session_id, 16);
302     memcpy(result->host_pubkey, resp->host_pubkey, 32);
303     result->capabilities = resp->capabilities;
304     result->max_participants = resp->max_participants;
305     result->current_participants = resp->current_participants;
306     result->has_password = resp->has_password != 0;
307     result->created_at = resp->created_at;
308     result->expires_at = resp->expires_at;
309     result->require_server_verify = resp->require_server_verify != 0;
310     result->require_client_verify = resp->require_client_verify != 0;
311 
312     log_info("Session found: %s (%d/%d participants, password=%s, policies: server_verify=%d client_verify=%d)",
313              session_string, result->current_participants, result->max_participants,
314              result->has_password ? "required" : "not required", result->require_server_verify,
315              result->require_client_verify);
316   } else {
317     log_info("Session not found: %s", session_string);
318   }
319 
320   buffer_pool_free(NULL, resp_payload, resp_size);
321   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
322 }

    acip_session_lookup_t, ASCIICHAT_OK,

    acds_session_lookup_result_t::found,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::has_password,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::host_pubkey, log_debug,
    log_info, acds_session_lookup_result_t::max_participants,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_INFO,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_LOOKUP, receive_packet(),
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::require_client_verify,
    acds_session_lookup_result_t::require_server_verify,
    send_packet(), acds_session_lookup_result_t::session_id,
    SET_ERRNO, and acds_client_t::socket.


Referenced by client_crypto_init().






asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_create (const
  uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t
  capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, uint8_t
  signature_out[64])


Sign a SESSION_CREATE message. Computes Ed25519 signature over:
    type || timestamp || capabilities || max_participants




Parameters


identity_seckey Ed25519 secret key (64 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


capabilities Capabilities bitfield


max_participants Maximum participants (1-8)


signature_out Output buffer for signature (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 423 of file acds_client.c.


424                                                                                                 {
425   if (!identity_seckey || !signature_out) {
426     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_sign_session_create");
427   }
428 
429   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || capabilities (1 byte) || max_participants (1 byte)
430   uint8_t message[11];
431   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE;
432 
433   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
434   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
435   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
436 
437   message[9] = capabilities;
438   message[10] = max_participants;
439 
440   // Sign using Ed25519
441   if (crypto_sign_detached(signature_out, NULL, message, sizeof(message), identity_seckey) != 0) {
442     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Ed25519 signature generation failed");
443   }
444 
445   log_debug("Generated SESSION_CREATE signature (timestamp=%llu, caps=%u, max=%u)", (unsigned long long)timestamp,
446             capabilities, max_participants);
447 
448   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
449 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by acds_session_create().






asciichat_error_t acds_sign_session_join (const
  uint8_t identity_seckey[64], uint64_t timestamp, const char *
  session_string, uint8_t signature_out[64])


Sign a SESSION_JOIN message. Computes Ed25519 signature over: type
    || timestamp || session_string




Parameters


identity_seckey Ed25519 secret key (64 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


session_string Session string (null-terminated)


signature_out Output buffer for signature (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 479 of file acds_client.c.


480                                                                                                 {
481   if (!identity_seckey || !session_string || !signature_out) {
482     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_sign_session_join");
483   }
484 
485   size_t session_len = strlen(session_string);
486   if (session_len > 48) {
487     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long (max 48 chars)");
488   }
489 
490   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || session_string (variable length)
491   uint8_t message[1 + 8 + 48];
492   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN;
493 
494   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
495   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
496   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
497 
498   // Copy session string (copy exactly session_len bytes, no null terminator in signature)
499   memcpy(&message[9], session_string, session_len);
500 
501   size_t message_len = 9 + session_len;
502 
503   // Sign using Ed25519
504   if (crypto_sign_detached(signature_out, NULL, message, message_len, identity_seckey) != 0) {
505     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO, "Ed25519 signature generation failed");
506   }
507 
508   log_debug("Generated SESSION_JOIN signature (timestamp=%llu, session='%s')", (unsigned long long)timestamp,
509             session_string);
510 
511   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
512 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by acds_session_join().






bool acds_validate_timestamp (uint64_t
  timestamp_ms, uint32_t window_seconds)


Check if timestamp is within acceptable window. Validates
    timestamp is recent (within window_seconds of current time) and not in the
    future.




Parameters


timestamp_ms Unix milliseconds timestamp


window_seconds Acceptable age window (e.g., 300 for 5 minutes)


Returns


true if timestamp is valid, false if too old or in the
  future


Definition at line 548 of file acds_client.c.


548                                                                              {
549   uint64_t now_ms = time_ns_to_ms(time_get_realtime_ns());
550   uint64_t window_ms = (uint64_t)window_seconds * 1000;
551 
552   if (timestamp_ms > now_ms + 60000) {
553     int64_t skew = (int64_t)timestamp_ms - (int64_t)now_ms;
554     log_warn("Timestamp is in the future: %llu > %llu (skew: %lld ms)", (unsigned long long)timestamp_ms,
555              (unsigned long long)now_ms, (long long)skew);
556     return false;
557   }
558 
559   uint64_t min_valid_timestamp = (now_ms >= window_ms) ? (now_ms - window_ms) : 0;
560   if (timestamp_ms < min_valid_timestamp) {
561     int64_t age = (int64_t)now_ms - (int64_t)timestamp_ms;
562     log_warn("Timestamp is too old: %llu < %llu (age: %lld ms, max: %u seconds)", (unsigned long long)timestamp_ms,
563              (unsigned long long)min_valid_timestamp, (long long)age, window_seconds);
564     return false;
565   }
566 
567   int64_t age = (int64_t)now_ms - (int64_t)timestamp_ms;
568   log_debug("Timestamp validation passed (age: %lld ms, window: %u seconds)", (long long)age, window_seconds);
569   return true;
570 }






References log_debug, log_warn, and
    time_get_realtime_ns().






asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_create (const
  uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, uint8_t
  capabilities, uint8_t max_participants, const uint8_t
  signature[64])


Verify SESSION_CREATE signature. Verifies Ed25519 signature
    matches the message fields.




Parameters


identity_pubkey Ed25519 public key (32 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


capabilities Capabilities bitfield


max_participants Maximum participants


signature Signature to verify (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if valid, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFY_FAILED if
  invalid


Definition at line 451 of file acds_client.c.


453                                                                           {
454   if (!identity_pubkey || !signature) {
455     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_verify_session_create");
456   }
457 
458   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || capabilities (1 byte) || max_participants (1 byte)
459   uint8_t message[11];
460   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE;
461 
462   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
463   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
464   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
465 
466   message[9] = capabilities;
467   message[10] = max_participants;
468 
469   // Verify using Ed25519
470   if (crypto_sign_verify_detached(signature, message, sizeof(message), identity_pubkey) != 0) {
471     log_warn("SESSION_CREATE signature verification failed");
472     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "Invalid SESSION_CREATE signature");
473   }
474 
475   log_debug("SESSION_CREATE signature verified successfully");
476   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
477 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    log_warn, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, and
    SET_ERRNO.






asciichat_error_t acds_verify_session_join (const
  uint8_t identity_pubkey[32], uint64_t timestamp, const char *
  session_string, const uint8_t signature[64])


Verify SESSION_JOIN signature. Verifies Ed25519 signature matches
    the message fields.




Parameters


identity_pubkey Ed25519 public key (32 bytes)


timestamp Unix milliseconds timestamp


session_string Session string (null-terminated)


signature Signature to verify (64 bytes)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if valid, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFY_FAILED if
  invalid


Definition at line 514 of file acds_client.c.


515                                                                                                     {
516   if (!identity_pubkey || !session_string || !signature) {
517     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "NULL parameter to acds_verify_session_join");
518   }
519 
520   size_t session_len = strlen(session_string);
521   if (session_len > 48) {
522     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Session string too long (max 48 chars)");
523   }
524 
525   // Build message: type (1 byte) || timestamp (8 bytes) || session_string (variable length)
526   uint8_t message[1 + 8 + 48];
527   message[0] = (uint8_t)PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN;
528 
529   // Convert timestamp to network byte order and pack into message
530   uint64_t timestamp_net = HOST_TO_NET_U64(timestamp);
531   memcpy(&message[1], &timestamp_net, sizeof(timestamp_net));
532 
533   // Copy session string (copy exactly session_len bytes, no null terminator in signature)
534   memcpy(&message[9], session_string, session_len);
535 
536   size_t message_len = 9 + session_len;
537 
538   // Verify using Ed25519
539   if (crypto_sign_verify_detached(signature, message, message_len, identity_pubkey) != 0) {
540     log_warn("SESSION_JOIN signature verification failed");
541     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION, "Invalid SESSION_JOIN signature");
542   }
543 
544   log_debug("SESSION_JOIN signature verified successfully");
545   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
546 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, ERROR_CRYPTO_VERIFICATION,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, HOST_TO_NET_U64, log_debug,
    log_warn, PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_JOIN, and
